intro.title: Welcome to R
intro.bodyMarkdown:
R is a language and environment for statistical computing and graphics, widely used in academia, research, and industry.

Practicing this topic builds fluency with R syntax, data structures, and the tidyverse ecosystem.

Run the sample code below, experiment in the editor, then work through the challenges.

challenges.title: Easy: Recognize What is R
challenges.promptMarkdown: Write R code related to **What is R**. Include: `print`.

challenges.title: Medium: Complete the pattern
challenges.promptMarkdown: Complete code that demonstrates **What is R**.

challenges.title: Hard: Apply the concept
challenges.promptMarkdown: Apply **What is R** in a short R snippet.

questions.prompt: R is primarily designed for:
Name one R keyword or function from this topic.
This topic is important in R because:

levels.title: R vs Python and Other Languages

intro.title: R vs Python and Other Languages
intro.bodyMarkdown:
R vs Python and Other Languages is a core topic when learning R for data analysis, statistics, and reproducible research.

Practicing this topic builds fluency with R syntax, data structures, and the tidyverse ecosystem.

Run the sample code below, experiment in the editor, then work through the challenges.
intro.sandboxCode:
# R excels at statistics; Python excels at general software
print("Compare tools to the task")

challenges.title: Easy: Recognize R vs Python and Other Languages
challenges.promptMarkdown: Write R code related to **R vs Python and Other Languages**. Include: `print`.

challenges.title: Medium: Complete the pattern
challenges.promptMarkdown: Complete code that demonstrates **R vs Python and Other Languages**.
challenges.starterCode: # R excels at statistics; Python excels at general software

challenges.title: Hard: Apply the concept
challenges.promptMarkdown: Apply **R vs Python and Other Languages** in a short R snippet.

questions.prompt: R is often compared to Python because both are used for:
Name one R keyword or function from this topic.
This topic is important in R because:
